goldNotRefound.sum: Cautilus installs via a tagged-release install script and `cautilus init` installs the CLI plus the Cautilus Agent into a host repo.

blindOnly.summary: cautilus init installs the CLI plus Cautilus Agent into a host repo
blindOnly.anchor: install CLI + Cautilus Agent into a host repo

blindOnly.summary: cautilus version --verbose inspects local version provenance
blindOnly.anchor: inspect local version provenance

blindOnly.summary: cautilus doctor adapter resolves and validates the adapter
blindOnly.anchor: resolve and validate the adapter

blindOnly.summary: cautilus doctor commands performs command discovery safe for wrapper tooling and agent runtimes
blindOnly.anchor: command discovery, safe for wrapper tooling and agent runtimes

blindOnly.summary: doctor status provides no-input agent orientation over binary, adapter, agent-surface, and claim state
blindOnly.anchor: no-input agent orientation over binary, adapter, agent-surface, and claim state

blindOnly.summary: cautilus doctor status gives no-input agent orientation over binary, adapter, agent-surface, and claim state
blindOnly.anchor: no-input agent orientation over binary, adapter, agent-surface, and claim state

blindOnly.summary: cautilus doctor reports repo readiness for evaluation
blindOnly.anchor: repo readiness for evaluation

blindOnly.summary: doctor --next-action gives one current onboarding step plus the exact continuation loop
blindOnly.anchor: one current onboarding step plus the exact continuation loop

blindOnly.summary: doctor --scope agent-surface checks local agent-skill discoverability in a consumer repo
blindOnly.anchor: local agent-skill discoverability in a consumer repo

blindOnly.summary: cautilus discover claims performs declared-claim discovery and proof planning
blindOnly.anchor: declared-claim discovery and proof planning

blindOnly.summary: cautilus discover scenarios emits the scenario-normalization catalog for proposal-input examples
blindOnly.anchor: scenario-normalization catalog, for agents that need proposal-input examples

blindOnly.summary: cautilus discover live-targets lists live consumer targets the host repo exposes to Cautilus
blindOnly.anchor: list live consumer targets that this host repo exposes to Cautilus

blindOnly.summary: cautilus evaluate live runs one bounded live scenario request against one selected instance
blindOnly.anchor: run one bounded live scenario request against one selected instance

blindOnly.summary: evaluate live prepare-request-batch turns draft scenarios into a canonical live-run request batch
blindOnly.anchor: turn draft scenarios into a canonical live-run request batch

blindOnly.summary: evaluate live scenarios runs many explicit live scenario requests against one selected instance
blindOnly.anchor: run many explicit live scenario requests against one selected instance

blindOnly.summary: An eval live instance is one live consumer target selectable by stable id
blindOnly.anchor: is one live consumer target on this host that `Cautilus` can select by stable id

blindOnly.summary: cautilus init run starts a fresh per-run subdirectory under one stable artifact root and pins it
blindOnly.anchor: start a fresh per-run subdirectory under one stable artifact root and pin it

blindOnly.summary: cautilus doctor artifacts prune prunes older Cautilus artifact bundles
blindOnly.anchor: prune older Cautilus artifact bundles

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios normalize skill normalizes skill-evaluation summaries
blindOnly.anchor: normalize skill-evaluation summaries

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios normalize workflow normalizes durable-workflow run summaries
blindOnly.anchor: normalize durable-workflow run summaries

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios prepare-input assembles a proposal-input packet from split normalized source files
blindOnly.anchor: assemble a proposal-input packet from split normalized source files

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios propose generates a scenario proposal packet from normalized input
blindOnly.anchor: generate a scenario proposal packet from normalized input

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios review-conversations builds a scenario-centric conversation review packet from normalized chatbot threads
blindOnly.anchor: build a scenario-centric conversation review packet from normalized chatbot threads

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios render-conversation-review-html renders the conversation review packet into HTML
blindOnly.anchor: render the conversation review packet into HTML

blindOnly.summary: discover scenarios summarize-telemetry summarizes scenario-level cost, token, and duration telemetry
blindOnly.anchor: summarize scenario-level cost, token, and duration telemetry

blindOnly.summary: cautilus evaluate skill-experiment compares one sandboxed skill-clone experiment after host-owned execution
blindOnly.anchor: compare one sandboxed skill-clone experiment after host-owned execution

blindOnly.summary: report build answers what the first product-owned decision packet is for candidate versus baseline
blindOnly.anchor: what is the first product-owned decision packet for this candidate versus the

blindOnly.summary: evaluate review prepare-input assembles a durable review packet around a report
blindOnly.anchor: assemble a durable review packet around a report

blindOnly.summary: evaluate review build-prompt-input builds the product-owned meta-prompt packet
blindOnly.anchor: build the product-owned meta-prompt packet

blindOnly.summary: evaluate review render-prompt renders the review prompt
blindOnly.anchor: render the review prompt

blindOnly.summary: evaluate review variants runs every executor variant defined by an adapter
blindOnly.anchor: run every executor variant defined by an adapter

blindOnly.summary: evaluate review variants can run an ad-hoc bounded review without first building a review packet
blindOnly.anchor: run an ad-hoc bounded review without first building a review packet

blindOnly.summary: review feedback build normalizes a source-bound review outcome into review-learning evidence
blindOnly.anchor: normalize a source-bound review outcome into review-learning evidence

blindOnly.summary: review feedback summarize summarizes selected review-learning packets by method family and disposition
blindOnly.anchor: summarize selected review-learning packets by method family and disposition

blindOnly.summary: missing_critical disposition may omit proposal evidence, recording that the method missed a needed proposal
blindOnly.anchor: `missing_critical` may omit proposal evidence

blindOnly.summary: Its disposition vocabulary is about review usefulness rather than pass/fail status
blindOnly.anchor: is about review usefulness rather than pass/fail status

blindOnly.summary: evaluate evidence prepare-input prepares normalized evidence input
blindOnly.anchor: prepare normalized evidence input

blindOnly.summary: improve propose produces a bounded one-shot improvement proposal from the improve input
blindOnly.anchor: cautilus improve propose

blindOnly.summary: doctor artifacts render-self-dogfood-html refreshes the static HTML view of the current self-dogfood bundle
blindOnly.anchor: refresh the static HTML view of the current checked-in self-dogfood bundle

blindOnly.summary: doctor artifacts render-self-dogfood-experiments-html refreshes the static HTML comparison view of the latest experiments bundle
blindOnly.anchor: refresh the static HTML comparison view of the current latest experiments bundle

blindOnly.summary: claude plugins validate validates the checked-in Claude marketplace and plugin manifest
blindOnly.anchor: validate the checked-in Claude marketplace and plugin manifest

blindOnly.summary: check-codex-marketplace.mjs verifies Codex can discover the repo-local marketplace entry
blindOnly.anchor: verify Codex can discover the repo-local marketplace entry

structuralAnchorOverlap.note: Recall here means 'a blind extractor surfaced a claim at this exact source line', confirming a real assertion sits there. cli.md puts each command on a labeled comment/heading line, so high exact-line agreement is expected from shared structure, not independent corroboration.
